title: PortableChests
description: Allows you to carry multiple chests / barrels
body:
# Portable Chests

> This project is heavily inspired by the mod [Carry On](https://modrinth.com/mod/carry-on)

Crouch + right click on a chest / barrel with both hands empty will pick it up, do it again on a empty spot will place it down (they can stack, so you can pick up multiple containers!)

Known Issues
---

- Chests won't combine into double chests when placed down
- I didn't store the chest content to file, so if you close the server while someone holding a container, it would be gone
  - This is intentional, I don't want people to overrely on this plugin and keep all their stuff in chests instead of shulker boxes

> I'm planning to add a warning when players carry the chests for too long
